changes: New: Folder system! Create, rename, delete, and organize folders with drag-and-drop sorting.
New: Bulk management for folders and books with selection mode and bottom action bar (Delete, Move To).
New: Each folder now maintains its own independent book sorting settings.
New: 'Recently Viewed' strip added to the library for quick access to your last-read books.
New: Favorite Folder support - set a default folder to load automatically on app startup.
Improved: Advanced Library sorting (Date, Title, Author, Chapters, Recents) with Ascending/Descending support.
Improved: Redesigned Book Cards and updated Library UI for better organization.
New: OLED Dark theme with pure black background for AMOLED screens.
Improved: Table of Contents and side drawer now respect all reader themes (Sepia, Dark, OLED).
Improved: "Previous Chapter" button now scrolls to the beginning of the chapter (consistent with "Next").
Added: Distinct 'O' icon for OLED theme selection in Settings and Reader controls.
New: Compact inline 'Go to Chapter' input inside the Table of Contents.
Fixed issue where the Table of Contents scrubber could become stuck at the top.
Fixed issue where some chapters would appear blank or truncated.
Improved XML parsing for EPUBs with non-standard HTML entities.
Enhanced reader stability with content-stable IDs for chapter elements.

Added support for common text formatting tags (
,
).
Better handling of SVG-wrapped images in chapters.
Improved Scrubber accuracy for shorter chapters.
Enhanced TOC navigation accessibility with wider touch targets.
Auto-dismiss controls when navigating via TOC or Scrubber.
Reworked UI element for Table of Contents
Added Welcome screen for fresh installs.
Implemented Chapter Navigation (Previous/Next) in reader controls.
Added scroll progress slider with percentage indicator.
Added version tracking and automatic changelog display.
Added Force LTR support for RTL languages.
Improved update logic for seamless transitions.
Enhanced TOC with header icons: Go to Chapter, Flipped Sort, and Locate Current.
Added Ascending/Descending chapter sorting that preserves list position.
Initial release of Blue Waves EPUB Reader.
Support for vertical scrolling and position restoration.
Customizable themes and fonts.
